requirement_topic.en: Mandatory Energy-Efficiency Labelling for Lighting (Argentine Energy Label)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明产品强制性能效标签（阿根廷能效标签）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明產品強制性能效標籤（阿根廷能效標籤）

summary.en: Argentina operates a mandatory energy-efficiency labelling regime for appliances, including in-scope lighting products, administered by the Secretaria de Energia together with the Secretaria de Comercio. In-scope lamps must display the Argentine energy-efficiency label (etiqueta de eficiencia energetica), an A-to-G style class derived from luminous efficacy, with the certification of efficiency typically demonstrated via IRAM standards and a recognized certifier. The label and its declared values must be in Spanish and present before the product is placed on the market and cleared through customs. This is a distinct obligation from the S-safety mark: a lamp may need both the safety certification (electrical safety) and the energy-efficiency label (performance/efficacy). Note: Argentina applies the energy label rather than an EU-style Ecodesign minimum-performance ban — verify the current in-scope lamp categories and label format with the relevant Secretaria resolution.
summary.zh: 阿根廷对家电（含适用照明产品）实施强制性能效标签制度，由能源秘书处（Secretaria de Energia）会同商务秘书处管理。适用灯具须标示阿根廷能效标签（etiqueta de eficiencia energetica），即基于光效得出的 A 至 G 式等级，能效认证通常通过 IRAM 标准及认可认证机构证明。标签及其声明值须使用西班牙语，并须在产品上市及清关前具备。该义务与 S 安全标志相互独立：一只灯可能同时需要安全认证（电气安全）与能效标签（性能/光效）。注意：阿根廷采用能效标签，而非欧盟式生态设计最低性能禁入——请依相关秘书处决议核实现行适用灯具类别及标签格式。
summary.zht: 阿根廷對家電（含適用照明產品）實施強制性能效標籤制度，由能源秘書處（Secretaria de Energia）會同商務秘書處管理。適用燈具須標示阿根廷能效標籤（etiqueta de eficiencia energetica），即基於光效得出的 A 至 G 式等級，能效認證通常通過 IRAM 標準及認可認證機構證明。標籤及其聲明值須使用西班牙語，並須在產品上市及清關前具備。該義務與 S 安全標誌相互獨立：一隻燈可能同時需要安全認證（電氣安全）與能效標籤（性能/光效）。注意：阿根廷採用能效標籤，而非歐盟式生態設計最低性能禁入——請依相關秘書處決議核實現行適用燈具類別及標籤格式。

standards_or_laws: Argentine mandatory energy-efficiency labelling regime for lighting — administered by Secretaria de Energia / Secretaria de Comercio (etiqueta de eficiencia energetica)
IRAM energy-efficiency standards for lamps (efficacy classification basis)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), defining three energy grades: Grade 1 (highest) >=90 lm/W, Grade 2 >=80 lm/W, Grade 3 >=70 lm/W, with Grade 3 the minimum for market entry. The mandatory China Energy Label (CEL) registration (administered by SAMR via CQC/CECP) must be completed and the CEL affixed before sale. The Chinese grade is based on absolute lm/W thresholds and is registered domestically; it is not transferable to the Argentine label class.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）>=90 lm/W、2 级 >=80 lm/W、3 级 >=70 lm/W，3 级为市场准入最低要求。强制性中国能效标识（CEL，由市场监管总局经 CQC/CECP 管理）须在销售前完成注册并贴附。中国等级基于绝对 lm/W 阈值并在境内注册，不可转用于阿根廷标签等级。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）>=90 lm/W、2 級 >=80 lm/W、3 級 >=70 lm/W，3 級為市場准入最低要求。強制性中國能效標識（CEL，由市場監管總局經 CQC/CECP 管理）須在銷售前完成註冊並貼附。中國等級基於絕對 lm/W 閾值並在境內註冊，不可轉用於阿根廷標籤等級。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Both China and Argentina require a mandatory energy-efficiency label, but they are administered by different authorities, use different class definitions, and have no mutual recognition: the Chinese CEL (Grade 1-3 on absolute lm/W) cannot substitute for the Argentine energy-efficiency label. For Argentina, the manufacturer must (1) test/declare efficacy under the applicable IRAM method, (2) obtain the efficiency class and certification through a recognized certifier, and (3) print the Argentine label artwork in Spanish on packaging and (where required) the product, before market placement and customs clearance. Unlike the EU, Argentina relies on the label (consumer information / market steering) rather than an EU-style Ecodesign minimum-efficacy ban — a low-efficacy lamp is not automatically barred but must carry its (lower) class. Verify the current in-scope lamp categories and label graphics with the governing resolution.
gap.zh: 中国与阿根廷均要求强制性能效标签，但二者由不同主管机关管理、采用不同等级定义且不互认：中国 CEL（基于绝对 lm/W 的 1-3 级）不可替代阿根廷能效标签。对阿根廷而言，制造商须（1）按适用 IRAM 方法检测/声明光效，（2）通过认可认证机构取得能效等级及认证，（3）在上市及清关前于包装及（如有要求）产品上印制西班牙语阿根廷标签。与欧盟不同，阿根廷依赖标签（消费者信息/市场引导）而非欧盟式生态设计最低光效禁入——低光效灯不会被自动禁止，但须标示其（较低）等级。请依现行管辖决议核实适用灯具类别及标签图样。
gap.zht: 中國與阿根廷均要求強制性能效標籤，但二者由不同主管機關管理、採用不同等級定義且不互認：中國 CEL（基於絕對 lm/W 的 1-3 級）不可替代阿根廷能效標籤。對阿根廷而言，制造商須（1）按適用 IRAM 方法檢測/聲明光效，（2）通過認可認證機構取得能效等級及認證，（3）在上市及清關前於包裝及（如有要求）產品上印製西班牙語阿根廷標籤。與歐盟不同，阿根廷依賴標籤（消費者信息/市場引導）而非歐盟式生態設計最低光效禁入——低光效燈不會被自動禁止，但須標示其（較低）等級。請依現行管轄決議核實適用燈具類別及標籤圖樣。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Argentine energy-efficiency label required for in-scope lamps before market placement and customs clearance; efficacy class certified via IRAM method and recognized certifier
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019 (minimum Grade 3, >=70 lm/W)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentina requires a mandatory energy-efficiency label for in-scope lamps, certified via the applicable IRAM efficacy method and a recognized certifier, printed in Spanish before market placement. This maps to the EU Ecodesign/energy-label function but is administered separately and is label-based rather than an EU-style minimum-efficacy ban. The Chinese CEL (GB 30255-2019, Grade 1-3) does not transfer to the Argentine label class. Verify the current in-scope categories and label format with the governing Secretaria resolution.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷要求适用灯具具备强制性能效标签，须按适用 IRAM 光效方法及认可认证机构认证，并在上市前以西班牙语印制。该要求对应欧盟生态设计/能效标签职能，但由独立机关管理且为标签式，而非欧盟式最低光效禁入。中国 CEL（GB 30255-2019，1-3 级）不可转用于阿根廷标签等级。请依现行管辖秘书处决议核实适用类别及标签格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷要求適用燈具具備強制性能效標籤，須按適用 IRAM 光效方法及認可認證機構認證，並在上市前以西班牙語印製。該要求對應歐盟生態設計/能效標籤職能，但由獨立機關管理且為標籤式，而非歐盟式最低光效禁入。中國 CEL（GB 30255-2019，1-3 級）不可轉用於阿根廷標籤等級。請依現行管轄秘書處決議核實適用類別及標籤格式。

requirement_topic.en: Performance Declarations (Efficacy / Lifetime / CRI) — No EU-Style Ecodesign Minimum Ban
requirement_topic.zh: 性能声明（光效/寿命/显色指数）——无欧盟式生态设计最低禁入
requirement_topic.zht: 性能聲明（光效/壽命/顯色指數）——無歐盟式生態設計最低禁入

summary.en: Argentina does not operate an EU-style Ecodesign Regulation that bans light sources below a minimum efficacy, CRI, lifetime, or power-factor threshold from the market. Instead, performance is handled through (a) the mandatory energy-efficiency label (efficacy class, see ledar-ecodesign-01) and (b) declared technical characteristics tested to IRAM standards adopting the relevant IEC performance methods (e.g., IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED lamp performance — luminous flux, efficacy, lifetime/lumen maintenance, colour rendering). Declared values must be substantiated and shown in Spanish. There is no horizontal minimum-performance prohibition; a low-efficacy product is steered by its (poor) label class rather than barred. Verify whether the specific lamp category has any minimum-performance trigger under current resolutions, and which IRAM/IEC performance methods the certifier requires.
summary.zh: 阿根廷不实行欧盟式生态设计法规，不会因光效、显色指数、寿命或功率因数低于某阈值而禁止光源进入市场。性能改以（a）强制性能效标签（光效等级，见 ledar-ecodesign-01）及（b）按采用相关 IEC 性能方法的 IRAM 标准检测的声明技术特性处理（如 IEC 62612 用于自镇流 LED 灯性能——光通量、光效、寿命/光通维持率、显色性）。声明值须有依据并以西班牙语标示。不存在横向最低性能禁入；低光效产品由其（较差）标签等级引导，而非被禁止。请核实具体灯具类别在现行决议下是否存在最低性能触发，以及认证机构要求的 IRAM/IEC 性能方法。
summary.zht: 阿根廷不實行歐盟式生態設計法規，不會因光效、顯色指數、壽命或功率因數低於某閾值而禁止光源進入市場。性能改以（a）強制性能效標籤（光效等級，見 ledar-ecodesign-01）及（b）按採用相關 IEC 性能方法的 IRAM 標準檢測的聲明技術特性處理（如 IEC 62612 用於自鎮流 LED 燈性能——光通量、光效、壽命/光通維持率、顯色性）。聲明值須有依據並以西班牙語標示。不存在橫向最低性能禁入；低光效產品由其（較差）標籤等級引導，而非被禁止。請核實具體燈具類別在現行決議下是否存在最低性能觸發，以及認證機構要求的 IRAM/IEC 性能方法。

standards_or_laws: IRAM-adopted IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting — Performance requirements (efficacy, lumen maintenance, colour rendering)
Argentine energy-efficiency labelling regime (Secretaria de Energia) — efficacy class as the market-steering mechanism

summary.en: China's GB 30255-2019 sets binding minimum efficacy grades (Grade 3 >=70 lm/W as the market-entry floor) plus the mandatory CEL, and GB/T performance methods (e.g., GB/T 24823 / IEC 62612-aligned performance test methods) cover efficacy, lumen maintenance, and colour rendering. China therefore has a binding minimum-efficacy floor for market entry, whereas Argentina relies on label class without an equivalent across-the-board prohibition.
summary.zh: 中国 GB 30255-2019 设定约束性最低能效等级（3 级 >=70 lm/W 为市场准入下限）并配合强制 CEL，GB/T 性能方法（如 GB/T 24823／与 IEC 62612 对齐的性能试验方法）涵盖光效、光通维持率及显色性。因此中国对市场准入设有约束性最低光效下限，而阿根廷依赖标签等级，无相当于全面禁入的规定。
summary.zht: 中國 GB 30255-2019 設定約束性最低能效等級（3 級 >=70 lm/W 為市場准入下限）並配合強制 CEL，GB/T 性能方法（如 GB/T 24823／與 IEC 62612 對齊的性能試驗方法）涵蓋光效、光通維持率及顯色性。因此中國對市場准入設有約束性最低光效下限，而阿根廷依賴標籤等級，無相當於全面禁入的規定。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (binding minimum Grade 3 >=70 lm/W)
GB/T 24823 / IEC 62612-aligned performance test methods for self-ballasted LED lamps (China)

gap.en: The regulatory mechanism differs: China imposes a binding minimum-efficacy floor (Grade 3 >=70 lm/W) for market entry, while Argentina does not have an EU-style horizontal minimum-performance ban — performance is steered by the mandatory energy label class plus declared, IRAM-tested characteristics. Practically, this means a low-efficacy lamp could be placed on the Argentine market with a poor label class, but it cannot be sold in China without meeting Grade 3. For Argentine export the manufacturer must: (1) substantiate the declared efficacy/lifetime/CRI via the IRAM-adopted IEC performance methods; (2) translate declarations into Spanish; (3) ensure the declared values match the energy-label class. Chinese GB 30255 grade data is a useful technical input but the Argentine class must be re-derived under the Argentine method and certified locally. Confirm any category-specific minimum-performance triggers in current resolutions.
gap.zh: 监管机制不同：中国对市场准入设有约束性最低光效下限（3 级 >=70 lm/W），而阿根廷无欧盟式横向最低性能禁入——性能由强制能效标签等级及经 IRAM 检测的声明特性引导。实务上，低光效灯可以较差标签等级进入阿根廷市场，但在中国未达 3 级则不能销售。对阿根廷出口，制造商须：（1）通过 IRAM 采用的 IEC 性能方法证实声明的光效/寿命/显色指数；（2）将声明译为西班牙语；（3）确保声明值与能效标签等级一致。中国 GB 30255 等级数据为有用的技术输入，但阿根廷等级须按阿根廷方法重新得出并在本地认证。请核实现行决议中是否有类别特定的最低性能触发。
gap.zht: 監管機制不同：中國對市場准入設有約束性最低光效下限（3 級 >=70 lm/W），而阿根廷無歐盟式橫向最低性能禁入——性能由強制能效標籤等級及經 IRAM 檢測的聲明特性引導。實務上，低光效燈可以較差標籤等級進入阿根廷市場，但在中國未達 3 級則不能銷售。對阿根廷出口，制造商須：（1）通過 IRAM 採用的 IEC 性能方法證實聲明的光效/壽命/顯色指數；（2）將聲明譯為西班牙語；（3）確保聲明值與能效標籤等級一致。中國 GB 30255 等級數據為有用的技術輸入，但阿根廷等級須按阿根廷方法重新得出並在本地認證。請核實現行決議中是否有類別特定的最低性能觸發。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (label/declaration), no EU-style minimum ban — performance steered by the mandatory energy-efficiency label and IRAM-tested declared characteristics; Argentina has no horizontal Ecodesign minimum-efficacy prohibition
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory minimum — GB 30255-2019 imposes a binding minimum efficacy (Grade 3 >=70 lm/W) for CN market entry

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentina has no EU-style Ecodesign regulation that bans light sources below a minimum efficacy/CRI/lifetime threshold. Performance is handled via the mandatory energy-efficiency label class plus declared characteristics tested to IRAM-adopted IEC performance methods (e.g., IEC 62612). This differs from China's binding GB 30255 minimum (Grade 3 >=70 lm/W). Manufacturers should substantiate declared values under the Argentine method, present them in Spanish, and confirm any category-specific minimum-performance trigger in current resolutions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷无欧盟式生态设计法规，不会因光效/显色指数/寿命低于某阈值而禁止光源。性能通过强制能效标签等级及按 IRAM 采用的 IEC 性能方法（如 IEC 62612）检测的声明特性处理。这与中国 GB 30255 约束性最低要求（3 级 >=70 lm/W）不同。制造商应按阿根廷方法证实声明值、以西班牙语标示，并核实现行决议中是否有类别特定最低性能触发。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷無歐盟式生態設計法規，不會因光效/顯色指數/壽命低於某閾值而禁止光源。性能通過強制能效標籤等級及按 IRAM 採用的 IEC 性能方法（如 IEC 62612）檢測的聲明特性處理。這與中國 GB 30255 約束性最低要求（3 級 >=70 lm/W）不同。制造商應按阿根廷方法證實聲明值、以西班牙語標示，並核實現行決議中是否有類別特定最低性能觸發。
